title: Desktop Publishers
description: Format typescript and graphic elements using computer software to produce publication-ready material.

tasks.text: Operate desktop publishing software and equipment to design, lay out, and produce camera-ready copy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Position text and art elements from a variety of databases in a visually appealing way to design print or web pages, using knowledge of type styles and size and layout patterns.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Check preliminary and final proofs for errors and make necessary corrections.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: View monitors for visual representation of work in progress and for instructions and feedback throughout process, making modifications as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Enter text into computer keyboard and select the size and style of type, column width, and appropriate spacing for printed materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare sample layouts for approval, using computer software.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Import text and art elements, such as electronic clip art or electronic files from photographs that have been scanned or produced with a digital camera, using computer software.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study layout or other design instructions to determine work to be done and sequence of operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select number of colors and determine color separations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Convert various types of files for printing or for the Internet, using computer software.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Enter digitized data into electronic prepress system computer memory, using scanner, camera, keyboard, or mouse.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Edit graphics and photos, using pixel or bitmap editing, airbrushing, masking, or image retouching.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Enter data, such as coordinates of images and color specifications, into system to retouch and make color corrections.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transmit, deliver, or mail publication master to printer for production into film and plates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with graphic artists, editors and writers to produce master copies according to design specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Store copies of publications on paper, magnetic tape, film, or diskette.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create special effects such as vignettes, mosaics, and image combining, and add elements such as sound and animation to electronic publications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load floppy disks or tapes containing information into system.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
